18a9db97-561f-4a87-bd42-97541a4f2d02.text:
CONFIDENTIALITY AND NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT FOR DISTRIBUTED GENERATION SERVICE

THIS AGREEMENT , is made and entered into this ____ day of ________, 20__, between _____________________________ (“Customer”) and Minnesota Power.

8dfa779f-50e6-4b09-a5f9-d3a7059fe1c5.label: text_chunk
8dfa779f-50e6-4b09-a5f9-d3a7059fe1c5.text: Customer and Minnesota Power may be individually referred to as the “Party” or collectively referred to as the “Parties”.WHEREAS, Customer desires to interconnect a distributed generation system with Minnesota Power pursuant to the terms set forth in the model Electric Service Agreement for Distributed Generation Service adopted as part of Minnesota Power’s Rider for Distributed Generation Service; and

23028ecc-f1e2-4d32-ab80-a215d59a465b.label: text_chunk

15e7b1d0-f9f3-498e-867c-0874b5564a86.label: text_chunk
15e7b1d0-f9f3-498e-867c-0874b5564a86.text:
NOW, THEREFORE, in consideration of the promises, covenants and agreements contained herein to be kept and performed by the Parties, it is mutually agreed as follows:
1. Minnesota Power shall furnish to Customer, by any means or medium, the proprietary, non-public information concerning Minnesota Power’s Payment Schedule.2. The information, knowledge and material exchanged pursuant to the preceding paragraph shall be referred to as the “Information.

d75a02ec-cc3b-46a8-b569-76ecdaa2a9cd.label: text_chunk
d75a02ec-cc3b-46a8-b569-76ecdaa2a9cd.text:
”  The Parties hereby agree to retain, and to require all respective representatives to retain, the Information provided pursuant to this Agreement in strict confidence in accordance with the terms set forth below.DG Confid.doc
3. It is agreed that the Information will be used by Customer only for the limited purpose of interconnecting a distributed generation system with Minnesota Power.  Without the prior written consent of Minnesota Power, any disclosure or other unauthorized use of the Information by Customer is prohibited.

b.  has become publicly known through no act of the Customer; or

8910011e-4771-46ea-a026-ba97abc3c10b.label: text_chunk
8910011e-4771-46ea-a026-ba97abc3c10b.text:
Customer and Minnesota Power hereby acknowledge that unauthorized disclosure or use of the Information may result in irreparable harm to Minnesota Power.  Accordingly, Customer agrees that Minnesota Power shall have the right to obtain a temporary restraining order enjoining disclosure or use of all Information subject to this Agreement.  Customer agrees not to contest the granting of such temporary restraining order.

  Such order shall become permanent upon adequate showing of irreparable injury and ruling by a court of law.

43c83a21-c60a-4d1d-8e45-228e53492a68.label: text_chunk
43c83a21-c60a-4d1d-8e45-228e53492a68.text: The Parties may participate in any contest relating to a permanent injunction.6. Upon the written request of Minnesota Power, the Customer shall return to Minnesota Power all documentation and electronic media containing Information and shall provide written certification that copies of all Information have been destroyed or returned.7.

294d07ed-8cd2-4298-9e49-58e4fd6ccabb.label: text_chunk
294d07ed-8cd2-4298-9e49-58e4fd6ccabb.text:
Customer agrees that, without the prior written consent of Minnesota Power, it will not make any statement to any competitor, customer or other third party with respect to the Information exchanged hereunder or regarding the Project itself.2
8. In further consideration of Minnesota Power disclosing its Information hereunder, Customer agrees that it will not use the Information for any third-party’s benefit or in providing services to third parties (which shall specifically include any wholesale or retail customer served by Minnesota Power).9.

c0b058d5-7991-4d2b-86cf-f1260a8ce805.label: text_chunk
c0b058d5-7991-4d2b-86cf-f1260a8ce805.text: This Agreement shall be effective for a term of ______ (__) years from the day first written above.

e2c157a1-086b-4364-bb38-2fa041139b8c.label: text_chunk
e2c157a1-086b-4364-bb38-2fa041139b8c.text: Notwithstanding the Parties entering into any further agreement or arrangement, or any other event or occurrence, the provisions of this Agreement relating to nondisclosure (including the provisions relating to the breach of this Agreement) or use of the Information shall remain in full force and effect for ________ years or as long as the Information is confidential and non-public, whichever is less, unless otherwise agreed to in writing by the Parties hereto.10.

4abad7de-7515-4d8e-8fc7-defeaaab3954.label: text_chunk
4abad7de-7515-4d8e-8fc7-defeaaab3954.text: If one or more of the sections or parts hereof are found to be unenforceable, illegal, or contrary to public policy or are in some other manner declared to be unenforceable by a court of competent jurisdiction, this Agreement shall remain in  full force and effect except for that paragraph or portion thereof determined to be unenforceable.11.

d54fa78c-8f48-41da-9989-b6a047921e3a.label: text_chunk
d54fa78c-8f48-41da-9989-b6a047921e3a.text: Nothing contained in the Agreement shall be construed as granting any rights under any patent, trademark or copyright, by license or otherwise, protecting any Information subject to this Agreement, and that this Agreement does not create a partnership, joint venture or other legal relationship between the Parties.

9efd620b-9db3-4826-9ac3-3e69aa43faf5.label: text_chunk
9efd620b-9db3-4826-9ac3-3e69aa43faf5.text: The construction, interpretation and performance of this Agreement, and all transactions under it, shall be governed by the laws of the State of Minnesota, without regard to Minnesota law governing conflict of laws, even if one or more of the Parties hereto may be a resident of, or domiciled in, any other state or country.12. This Agreement shall be binding upon and shall inure to the benefit of the Parties hereto and their respective heirs, successors, representatives and assigns.

community_summary.0:
**Summary of Relationships between Customer and Minnesota Power**

1. **Service Provision**: The Customer receives services from Minnesota Power as part of a contractual agreement, indicating a service-oriented relationship.

2. **Contractual Agreement**: There exists a formal contractual relationship between the Customer and Minnesota Power concerning the interconnection of a distributed generation system, highlighting the legal framework governing their interactions.

3. **Desire for Service**: The Customer expresses a desire to receive the Distributed Generation Capacity and Energy Payment Schedule from Minnesota Power, further emphasizing the service relationship.

4. **Use of Information**: The Customer is permitted to use information provided by Minnesota Power specifically for the purpose of interconnecting a distributed generation system, indicating a direct and functional relationship regarding information usage.

5. **Approval Requirement**: Minnesota Power holds the authority to approve or deny the release of certain information, necessitating the Customer to obtain written authorization, which underscores the regulatory aspect of their relationship.

6. **Obligation to Return Information**: The Customer is legally obligated to return all documentation and electronic media containing information to Minnesota Power upon request, reinforcing the contractual obligations between the two parties.

7. **Agreement to Terms**: The Customer agrees to the terms set forth by Minnesota Power regarding the use of information and services, solidifying the contractual nature of their relationship.

Overall, the interactions between the Customer and Minnesota Power are characterized by a blend of service provision, contractual obligations, and regulatory compliance, all of which are essential for the effective interconnection of distributed generation systems.

community_summary.2:
**Summary of Relationships Involving Minnesota Power and Customers**

1. **Information Disclosure**: Minnesota Power is willing to share proprietary information, specifically regarding its Payment Schedule, with Customers. This indicates a relationship characterized by transparency and information sharing.

2. **Service Provision**: Minnesota Power is responsible for providing electricity and related services to Customers. This establishes a fundamental service provider-client relationship, highlighting the utility's role in meeting the energy needs of its Customers.

3. **Confidentiality Agreement**: Minnesota Power requires Customers to maintain the confidentiality of the information shared, reinforcing a relationship built on trust and legal obligations regarding information security.

4. **Legal Rights**: In the event of unauthorized disclosure of information, Minnesota Power reserves the right to pursue legal action against Customers. This underscores the seriousness of the confidentiality terms and the protective measures in place for proprietary information.

Overall, the relationships between Minnesota Power and its Customers are defined by service provision, information sharing, confidentiality obligations, and legal protections, emphasizing the importance of trust and compliance in their interactions.

community_summary.4:
**Summary of Relationships:**

1. **Recipient and Discloser**: The Recipient receives information from the Discloser, which is often bound by confidentiality obligations as specified in legal agreements. The Recipient has a duty to notify the Discloser if there is a legal requirement to disclose any Confidential Information.

2. **Recipient and Confidential Information**: The Recipient is the designated entity that receives Confidential Information under the terms of the agreement. They are responsible for ensuring that this information is not disclosed to Unauthorised Persons, who are defined as individuals without permission to access such information.

3. **Recipient and Unauthorised Persons**: The Recipient is tasked with excluding Unauthorised Persons from accessing Confidential Information. They must actively restrict any disclosure of this information to maintain confidentiality.

4. **Recipient and Officers**: The Recipient authorizes its officers to access Confidential Information strictly for necessary purposes, ensuring that only those who require access are permitted to do so.

5. **Recipient's Obligations**: The Recipient is required to return all Confidential Information in their possession or control upon request, reinforcing their responsibility to manage sensitive information appropriately.

This summary encapsulates the critical aspects of the relationships, emphasizing the Recipient's role in handling Confidential Information, their obligations towards the Discloser, and the importance of maintaining confidentiality.
